hero.title: Verifiable Policy. Uncompromised Access.
hero.subtitle: Eliminating policy bottlenecks through architectural oversight and deep programmatic Subject Matter Expertise (SME). Programmatic mandates are translated into deterministic code upfront, keeping deployments moving, predicting downstream effects, and guaranteeing federal compliance.

challenge.label: The Translation Gap
challenge.title: Accelerating Technical Alignment.
challenge.text: State tech deployments often stall in the gap between complex federal rules and system architecture. Applied Policy Systems bridges this divide. Instead of IT waiting months for open-ended policy interpretations, programmatic mandates are translated into deterministic logic upfront. Engineering teams are provided with the exact parameters they need to force rapid, on-the-spot decisions from policy stakeholders—keeping deployments moving, predicting downstream effects, and securing federal compliance.

infrastructure.label: Holistic Oversight
infrastructure.title: Architectural Acceleration & SME.
infrastructure.text: We deploy strict technical rules informed by cross-program expertise to bypass bureaucratic drag and ensure systemic changes do not trigger automated federal penalties.

sandbox.label: Simulator 01
sandbox.title: Automated Policy Verification
sandbox.text: See how we map real-world evidence against strict statutory ontologies, calculating empirical sufficiency scores to verify federal compliance.

manual.label: Simulator 02
manual.title: Frontline Decision Support
manual.text: See how we translate ambiguous policy into deterministic, statute-backed answers, forcing rapid alignment for caseworkers.

extraction.label: Simulator 03
extraction.title: Deterministic Logic Compiler
extraction.text: See how we extract formal mathematical logic from natural language mandates, handing IT teams executable schemas upfront.

hero.label: Capabilities
hero.title: Architectural Oversight & Policy Engineering
hero.subtitle: Targeted engineering oversight and wide-lens SME capabilities to eliminate policy lag. Programmatic changes are translated flawlessly into code without stalling IT or triggering catastrophic cross-program errors.

statutory.title: Statutory Translation & Downstream Prediction
statutory.text: The gap between policy intent and system logic is eliminated through upfront translation, providing IT teams with an independent source of truth. Exact deterministic rules are provided to engineering, preventing endless policy review cycles. Mathematical verification ensures that new code won't trigger cascading downstream errors in interconnected HHS programs, defending against unfunded federal mandates.

rulesEngine.title: AI Governance & System Sovereignty
rulesEngine.text: Technical legal frameworks are supplied to bind and control AI deployments within state authorities. Professional architectural standards eliminate vendor lock-in and technical debt, ensuring systems remains sovereign and maintainable. Automation acts as a verifiable caseworker aid, guided by deterministic legal boundaries rather than unverified probabilistic models.

sanction.title: PER Reduction & Predictive Analytics
sanction.text: Public sector risk is managed through statutory predictive analytics and Payment Error Rate (PER) mitigation. High-risk case profiles and technical logic gaps are identified before they manifest as massive federal audit fines. This architectural oversight successfully defends against federal payment penalties by neutralizing fiscal risk upfront.

data.title: Coalition Building & Frontline Readiness
data.text: Even perfectly translated code fails if operational readiness is ignored. Procedures are engineered around the people who actually do the work, deploying frontline-first change management and building cross-agency coalitions to ensure technical success and human adoption.

sprint.title: Targeted Architectural Interventions
sprint.text: Rapid oversight deployments to diagnose structural logic flaws, bypass policy bottlenecks, map downstream dependencies, and verify complex code.

advisory.title: Technical Expert Advisory
advisory.text: Long-term partnership acting as the State's technical referee, eliminating policy drag, predicting cross-system downstream effects, and pre-testing new rules before production.

integration.title: System Procurement & Blueprinting
integration.text: End-to-end consulting to write the strict technical rules of massive state RFPs or internal builds, ensuring programmatic changes execute deterministically.

sideCard.title: Deterministic Logic
sideCard.text: Mathematical theorem provers verify that eligibility logic is a 1:1 reflection of statutory requirements before developers write a single line of code.

section1.title: HHS Blast Radius Prediction
section1.text: Administrative law is heavily interconnected. A simple change to a Medicaid MAGI calculation can inadvertently trigger a massive FNS variance in SNAP. This blind spot is eliminated by modeling systemic rules upfront, predicting cascading effects across HHS programs, and allowing IT to deploy with mathematical confidence.

section2.title: IT-First Source of Truth
section2.text: Ambiguous legislative mandates are translated into deterministic models. Instead of waiting months for qualitative policy reviews, IT is provided with a source of truth that accelerates development. By providing the exact interpretation and legal basis upfront, policy stakeholders are typically provided with information that allows for rapid, informed decisions—keeping cloud migrations on track.

sideCard.title: System Sovereignty
sideCard.text: Maintenance of strict data boundaries ensures that systems remain under state control, making daily operations easier and more maintainable.

section1.title: Binding AI Frameworks
section1.text: Algorithmic harm is prevented through upfront boundaries. Rigorous 'ethics-by-design' guardrails bind AI usage to deterministic laws. Pre-Mortem Analyses and adversarial Red Teaming guarantee that automation tools act strictly as casework aids with direct legal citations, not unverified decision engines.

section2.title: Eliminating Vendor Lock-in
section2.text: Technical debt is often a byproduct of vendor capture. Sovereign architectural standards are engineered into system requirements, preventing proprietary lock-in. This moves the state toward decoupled ecosystems that are easier to maintain, update, and integrate without surrendering control to external platforms.

sideCard.title: Frontline Alignment
sideCard.text: Caseworkers require authoritative answers that can be bound to records for audit safety and legal certainty.

section1.title: Statute-Backed Querying
section1.text: The frontline is provided with an information resource capable of answering specific case queries with legal citations. These answers can be bound directly to the case record, providing caseworkers with statute-backed certainty and an immutable audit trail for every determination.

section2.title: Administrative Burden Reduction
section2.text: Deterministic logic reduces the 'Time Tax' on both staff and residents. By assessing the administrative burden—including losses due to disconnected human processes—bottlenecks are eliminated through better logic, ensuring that clinical and operational needs drive the technology.

sideCard.title: Fiscal Security
sideCard.text: Defending against federal payment penalties by neutralizing fiscal risk through upfront architectural oversight.

section1.title: PER Defense Engineering
section1.text: Payment Error Rate (PER) findings are often the result of technical logic gaps. Success is achieved by engineering high-fidelity rules that survive federal audits. Strict technical requirements ensure that programmatic changes execute deterministically, protecting the state from multi-million dollar penalties.

section2.title: Statutory Predictive Analytics
section2.text: Public sector risk is managed through predictive analytics. Utilizing Arnold Ventures style predictive error models allows agencies to identify high-risk case profiles and logic vulnerabilities before they manifest as audit fines. This architectural oversight keeps major deployments moving by neutralizing fiscal risk upfront and protecting systemic integrity.

sideCard.title: Operational Readiness
sideCard.text: Technology adoption depends on aligning system logic with the reality of frontline operations.

section1.title: Cross-Agency Coalition Building
section1.text: Major tech deployments often fail due to inter-agency siloes. Success depends on building robust coalitions where policy, IT, and operations act as a single unit. Alignment is facilitated, ensuring that programmatic goals are reflected in the technical architecture across all participating agencies.

section2.title: Frontline-First Change Management
section2.text: Top-down mandates rarely survive the frontline. Deployment of 'Frontline-First' change management engages caseworkers and supervisors as operational co-designers. By translating technical system changes directly into their daily reality, new technology accelerates workflows rather than breaking them.

founder.title: Founder Dossier
founder.intro: We provide the architectural oversight and wide-lens programmatic SME required to eliminate policy bottlenecks and ensure state mandates are flawlessly translated into deterministic system code.
founder.p1: Applied Policy Systems was established to guide state agencies out of the 'Modernization Trap.' States spent hundreds of millions moving to the cloud, only to realize their IT teams are trapped waiting on complex policy interpretations, and their systems are blind to cross-program downstream effects.
founder.p2: We act as the ultimate accelerator and strategic failsafe for State CIOs and Agency Directors. We leverage our unique scope of programmatic experience to provide exact technical logic upfront, bypassing bureaucratic drag and ensuring your infrastructure is accurate, accountable, and legally secure.
